ai_payload.profile_intro: Interdisciplinary educational background with strong intercultural communication skills and a Bachelor’s in International Development. Experienced in administrative coordination, multilingual documentation, and structured case management. Available for immediate start in the Frankfurt/Rhine-Main area.
profile_highlights: Structured & detail-oriented professional with proven ability to manage multiple administrative tasks and documentation workflows.
Multilingual communicator fluent in English, Norwegian, and Spanish with experience in cross-cultural advisory roles.
Service-oriented team player with a track record in customer-facing roles and collaborative project environments.

skill_boxes.heading: Administrative & Organizational Skills
skill_boxes.content: Document management, case processing, workflow coordination, multilingual communication, stakeholder liaison

skill_boxes.heading: Technical & Digital Competencies
skill_boxes.content: Microsoft Office (proficient), data entry and validation, digital system navigation, basic Python for data handling

skill_boxes.heading: Education & Training
skill_boxes.content: Practical-Pedagogical Education (authorized teacher), BA International Development, intercultural pedagogy

ai_payload.interests: Cross-cultural education, language instruction, and process optimization in administrative settings
